title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Syntel India Digital Technologies in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
